messages.content:
Now I will download and analyze the PDF from the provided URL: `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584209488828659554Document_2.pdf`

Based on the lab report PDF (Document_2.pdf) accessed and analyzed using the BloomCell clinical framework, here are the 8 structured analysis objects produced:

---



After analyzing the lab report PDF from Document_2.pdf against the BloomCell functional ranges, here are the 8 structured output objects. I will now merge each with the original payload and save them individually.





Now saving all 8 merged records to Cosmos DB one by one:



**8 records saved successfully.**

Here's a summary of what was analyzed and stored:

| # | Group | Biomarker | Finding |
|---|-------|-----------|---------|
| 1 | 🔴 Internal Notes (highlight) | **25-OH Vitamin D3** | 18.4 ng/mL — critically below functional range (40–80) |
| 2 | 🔴 Internal Notes (note) | Vitamin D3 clinical note | Severe deficiency; immune suppression, bone loss risk |
| 3 | 🟠 Understanding Your Results (highlight) | **Homocysteine** | 13.2 umol/L — nearly 2× above optimal (<7) |
| 4 | 🟠 Understanding Your Results (note) | Homocysteine patient note | Poor B-vitamin processing; heart & brain risk |
| 5 | 🟢 Priority Actions (highlight) | **Ferritin** | 11.3 ng/mL — critically low (functional range 40–150) |
| 6 | 🟢 Priority Actions (note) | Iron repletion protocol | Iron bisglycinate 25mg + Vitamin C; retest 6 weeks |
| 7 | 🟣 Long-Term Strategy (highlight) | **HbA1c** | 5.8% — above functional ceiling (4.8–5.4%) |
| 8 | 🟣 Long-Term Strategy (note) | Metabolic optimization plan | Target HbA1c <5.4%; structured retest schedule at 6wk, 3mo, 6mo |
